name: Banana Chocolate Chip Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the milk to the mixing bowl.
2. Add the mashed bananas to the milk.
3. Add the egg and butter (or margarine) to the bowl.
4. Add the salt to the bowl.
5. Add the bread flour, chocolate pieces, and bread machine yeast in order as specified by the manufacturer's instructions.
6. Set the machine to the basic/white bread cycle with a light color setting.
7. Mix until combined, then pour into a greased loaf pan.
8. Bake according to the manufacturer's directions for your specific breadmaker model.
Note: The outcome of this bread may vary depending on your breadmaker. Some machines will produce a smooth chocolate-colored bread, while others may leave bits of chocolate chips or create a marbled loaf.
